title: Local authority capital expenditure and receipts in England: 2024 to 2025 final outturn
body: "This release provides the final outturn for local authority capital expenditure and receipts in the financial year April 2024 to March 2025.  The final outturn information is derived from capital outturn returns (COR) submitted by local authorities in England. "

taxons.title: Local government finance and capital assets
